description: Your Arcane Missiles and basic attacks restore mana to you when they hit an enemy.
tooltipTemplate: Each Arcane Missile hit restores {manaPerHit} mana; each basic attack restores {manaPerBasicAttack}.

description: Your Arcane Missiles can trigger your equipped items' on-hit effects.
tooltipTemplate: Arcane Missiles can trigger your items' on-hit effects.

description: Your Arcane Missiles have a chance to unleash one of your learned spells at reduced power.
tooltipTemplate: {procChance%} chance on an Arcane Missile hit to cast a random learned spell at {effectiveness%} effectiveness.
